[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100010 2
1 101010001 4
2 110100110 5
3 110111011 7
4 001110010 4
5 000001101 3
6 001111011 6
7 111100000 4

01 10 000001001 2
12 21 001100000 2
23 32 000100000 1
34 43 000000000 a
45 54 100000000 1
56 65 110100010 4
67 76 000110010 3
70 07 000000000 a

02 20 000000000 a
13 31 000100010 2 match 0
24 42 101000000 2
35 53 000100010 2 match 0
46 64 100010001 3
57 75 000100010 2 match 0
60 06 000001001 2
71 17 001110010 4 match 4

14 41 001010001 3
25 52 110100000 3

50 05 000000100 1
61 16 000111011 5
72 27 001100000 2
